lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Block 1 Review -- Meet Someone New
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Estephano Akihito Ishii | Aula 8 -- Block 1 Review

listenings.text: Hi, my name is Lucas. Let me tell you all about me. I am from Rio de Janeiro, but now I live in Sao Paulo. My family is big. I have two brothers and one sister. My favorite hobby is playing soccer. I also like reading books at night. I am a friendly person, and I love meeting new people. Nice to meet you!

Hello, my name is Marina. I want to tell you about me. My hometown is Curitiba. I have a small family: my mother, my father, and me. I have a pet, a little dog. My favorite thing is cooking with my mother on Sunday. I am a happy and nice person. I like meeting new friends. What about you?

extra_audio.text: Estephano goes to a party. He meets a new friend, Sara. He tells her his name and his hometown. They talk about their family and their hobbies. At the end, they are good friends.
